title: Lucky's Locksmith
description: A mod that adds more ways to store and lock up your items!
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/pJYISMU.png)
![Other Projects](https://i.imgur.com/9gdzZz9.png)
![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/1wIGBkZ.png)

Translation:

Lucky's Locksmith is a Minecraft mod that introduces a new layer of security to your survival world. Tired of people snooping through your stuff on multiplayer servers? Want to add more depth to your base defense? This mod is for you!

Craft up a KEY and use it to lock your chest and barrels! Locked chest can only be opened by players with the correct key either in their hand, or, has it equip as a CURIO slot!

This mod also aims to lay the foundation for a new lock system for dungeons! With the addition of the Trials & Chambers update, mojang added Keys into the game. This mod expands on this feature by asking, what if there was a key for each dungeon?

At the moment, there are only the Golden and Trial Locks. Both are DEVELOPER ITEMS ONLY that can be found in the Operator Utilities Creative Tab. Developers and Players alike can use these when creating dungeons to add locks to certain chest in their structures.
